note: Character/Property/Background regained a Flow prompt (031_stage3_flow_prompts) — not Gemini-drafted, just a fixed reference-sheet template (from the user's own tested RTF prompts) wrapped around one designer-typed one-line description, same masterSheetPrompt+yourDescription pattern as Story/Scene/Movie. This lives in the StagePay Bridge extension only, never in the swimlane itself — the swimlane stays upload-only for these types (see STAGEPAY_SWIMLANE_EXTENSION_PLAN.md). Sound has no Flow prompt — it's real audio, nothing to generate — and stays upload-only everywhere.

outputInstructions.label: Master Character Reference Sheet Prompt
outputInstructions.text:
Create a professional CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET for AI video generation.

Create ONE clean studio reference sheet.

==================================================
HEADER
==================================================

Title:
CHARACTER TURNAROUND SHEET

Subtitle:
REFERENCE FOR AI VIDEO GENERATION

==================================================
CHARACTER VIEWS
==================================================

Generate the EXACT SAME PERSON in FIVE UNIQUE full-body views.

Arrange left to right.

1. FRONT VIEW
• Facing camera directly

2. LEFT SIDE PROFILE (90°)
• Complete left profile
• Only left side of face visible

3. BACK VIEW (180°)
• Complete back view

4. RIGHT SIDE PROFILE (90°)
• Complete right profile
• Only right side of face visible

5. RIGHT 3/4 VIEW (45°)
• Rotate character exactly 45° toward the RIGHT
• Show both eyes
• RIGHT side of face is dominant
• Must NOT duplicate any previous view

==================================================
IDENTITY LOCK
==================================================

Every panel must show the EXACT SAME PERSON.

Identical

• Face
• Eyes
• Nose
• Lips
• Jawline
• Hair
• Skin tone
• Height
• Weight
• Body proportions
• Clothing
• Accessories
• Shoes

No variation whatsoever.

==================================================
POSE
==================================================

Neutral facial expression

Relaxed standing pose

Arms naturally beside body

Feet shoulder-width apart

No smile

No action pose

==================================================
CAMERA
==================================================

Orthographic character turnaround

Eye-level camera

Same camera distance

Same focal length

Same lighting

Equal spacing

==================================================
LIGHTING
==================================================

Soft white studio lighting

Even illumination

No dramatic shadows

==================================================
BACKGROUND
==================================================

Plain light gray seamless background

==================================================
BOTTOM PANEL
==================================================

Create a professional information panel.

LEFT

CHARACTER DETAILS

• Name (leave blank if not provided)
• Age
• Occupation
• Height
• Build

CENTER

KEY FEATURES

• Face Shape
• Hair Style
• Eye Color
• Skin Tone

RIGHT

WARDROBE

• Top
• Bottom
• Shoes
• Accessories

Include wardrobe color swatches.

==================================================
STYLE
==================================================

Professional animation model sheet

Character design turnaround

Photorealistic

Commercial photography

Ultra detailed

Luxury fashion catalog quality

Sharp focus

8K

==================================================
NEGATIVE
==================================================

No duplicate views

No mirrored views

No extra people

No props

No environment

No perspective distortion

No anatomy errors

No cropped body

No hairstyle changes

No clothing changes

No accessory changes

No facial changes

Do not invent a character name.

Maintain perfect identity consistency.

outputInstructions.label: Master Prop Reference Sheet Prompt
outputInstructions.text:
Generate five unique views.

1. Front
2. Left Side
3. Back
4. Right Side
5. Top View

Same proportions.
Same label.
Same colors.
Same reflections.

Plain white background.

Professional product photography.

Ultra detailed.

Commercial catalog quality.

8K.

No hands.

No people.

No shadows covering the label.

outputInstructions.label: Master Background Reference Sheet Prompt
outputInstructions.text:

1. Wide Front
2. Left Corner
3. Right Corner
4. Window Perspective

Same lighting
Same furniture
Same layout
Same colors

Professional interior reference sheet
